critical.mandate: Check web access availability before research
Provide objective trade-off analysis, not technology advocacy

step.title: Technology Scoping
step.ask: What technologies or tech stack do you want to research?
What is the use case or problem context?
Are there constraints (team expertise, budget, timeline)?

step.title: Web Access Check
step.action: Check if MCP web tools are available
step.check: Notify user and proceed with general knowledge only

step.title: Technology Evaluation
step.action: Assess each technology for: maturity, community size, learning curve, licensing
Evaluate ecosystem: libraries, tools, IDE support, documentation quality
Check production readiness: stability, performance characteristics, scalability

step.title: Trade-off Analysis
step.action: Create pros/cons matrix for each technology option

step.title: Generate Output
step.template-output: Generate technical research report with: technology overview, evaluation matrix, trade-off analysis, recommendation, and migration/adoption considerations.
